event: Google Books / Google Library Project launches; partner libraries (Michigan UC etc) begin contributing scans of print collections
Open Content Alliance forms (Internet Archive-led counter-program); same partner-library digitization work flows there too
HathiTrust launches as shared digital repository; founding members include 12 CIC universities + 11 UC libraries + University of Virginia
IMLS National Leadership Grant launches Copyright Review Management System (CRMS)
John Wilkin (UMich Associate University Librarian) becomes founding Executive Director
Authors Guild and others file copyright suit against HathiTrust and member universities (S.D.N.Y.)
HathiTrust Research Center (HTRC) launches as Indiana U + U Illinois Urbana-Champaign + HathiTrust partnership
HathiTrust voluntarily suspends Orphan Works Project
HathiTrust governance bylaws established; Board of Governors and Program Steering Committee formalized
District court (Judge Harold Baer Jr.) grants summary judgment for HathiTrust on full-text-search and accessibility uses
Founding Director John Wilkin leaves HathiTrust to become Dean of Libraries at U Illinois Urbana-Champaign
Mike Furlough succeeds Wilkin as Executive Director
Second Circuit (Judges Parker Walker Cabranes; opinion by Parker) affirms district court; full-text search and accessibility uses are fair use; preservation-copy claim remanded for standing
Authors Guild settles remaining preservation-copy claim with HathiTrust
Committee on Institutional Cooperation (CIC) renamed Big Ten Academic Alliance (BTAA)
Projected annual budget $3
Emergency Temporary Access Service (ETAS) launches in response to COVID-19 library closures
Within ~2 months of launch ETAS in use at 171 campuses; ~300K accesses
Andrew W. Mellon Foundation awards $1M grant for core preservation and portfolio management staffing
Cost-per-volume $0.2294; Tier 2 baseline public-domain fee $7414
HathiTrust Board votes to end HTRC funding at end of 2026; HTRC Transition FAQ posted
Hofstra University Library joins HathiTrust
Corpus passes 18M volumes; 6.7M in US public domain; 219+ member libraries
Corpus passes 19M volumes; 290+ member libraries
Members vote to approve 2026 budget; Mary-Jo K. Romaniuk (U Calgary) elected to Board for 2026-2028; Lorrie McAllister (Hofstra) re-elected
Cost-per-volume $0.2403; HTRC funding ends end of year (planned closure)
